since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.77%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.86% · BTC -4.56% · Gold -2.98% · Nasdaq100 +2.26%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.77%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.77%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +13.02%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +13.02%, INTC +10.72%, SMR +10.35%, KLAC +9.51%, MU +9.17%. Laggards: INOD -8.61%, SPCX -6.42%, IBM -4.83%, WDAY -3.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.42% at $179.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
